Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a single business tenant in the multi-tenant SaaS application, owning its own data and users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tenant entity.

name.description: The legal or business name of the tenant.

ownerUserId.description: Reference to the User entity that created and owns this tenant. (Relationship: User 1:N Tenant)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tenant record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the tenant record was last updated.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a communication thread between a tenant user and a customer.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: An individual message within a chat thread.

senderId.description: UID of the user or 'client' for incoming SMS.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a business user within a specific tenant, with defined roles and access permissions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity (typically Firebase Auth UID).

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this user belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N User)

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication and contact.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The assigned role for the user (Owner/Admin, Estimator/Office user, Crew Manager, Crew Member), determining their permissions.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer or lead managed through the CRM module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this customer belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Customer)

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

email.description: The primary email address of the customer.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the customer.

address.description: The primary physical address of the customer or job site.

notes.description: General notes or comments about the customer.

pipelineStage.description: The current stage of the customer in the sales pipeline (e.g., Lead, Contacted, Qualified, Won, Lost).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Defines a raw material used in fence construction, including its cost and vendor information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Material entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this material belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Material)

name.description: The name of the material (e.g., 'Cedar Picket 1x6', 'Galvanized Steel Post').

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the material (e.g., 'linear foot', 'each', 'sq ft').

unitCost.description: The cost of one unit of the material.

vendor.description: The supplier or vendor of the material.

active.description: Indicates if the material is currently active and available for use in styles.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the material record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the material record was last updated.

FenceStyle.title: FenceStyle
FenceStyle.description: Defines a complete fence style, including its constituent materials and measurement basis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FenceStyle entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this fence style belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N FenceStyle)

name.description: The name of the fence style (e.g., '6ft Privacy Cedar Fence').

description.description: A detailed description of the fence style.

measurementBasis.description: The basis for measurement and cost calculation for this style ('perFoot' or 'perSection').

billOfMaterials.description: List of materials required per unit (foot or section) of this fence style.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the fence style record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the fence style record was last updated.

PostStyle.title: PostStyle
PostStyle.description: Defines a post style used in fence construction, including its constituent materials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PostStyle entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this post style belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N PostStyle)

name.description: The name of the post style (e.g., '4x4 Treated Pine Post').

description.description: A detailed description of the post style.

billOfMaterials.description: List of materials required per unit of this post style (e.g., per post).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post style record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the post style record was last updated.

GateStyle.title: GateStyle
GateStyle.description: Defines a gate style used in fence construction, including its constituent materials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GateStyle entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this gate style belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N GateStyle)

name.description: The name of the gate style (e.g., '3ft Walk-Through Gate').

description.description: A detailed description of the gate style.

billOfMaterials.description: List of materials required per unit of this gate style (e.g., per gate).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the gate style record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the gate style record was last updated.

Estimate.title: Estimate
Estimate.description: Represents a generated cost estimate for a customer's fence project, including line items, pricing, and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Estimate entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this estimate belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Estimate)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer entity for whom this estimate was created. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Estimate)

contactSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the customer's contact information at the time the estimate was created.

jobSiteAddress.description: A snapshot of the job site address at the time the estimate was created.

lineItems.description: Details of each item included in the estimate, including material and labor cost snapshots.

calculationSettingsSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the tenant's pricing and calculation settings at the time the estimate was created.

materialsCost.description: The total material cost for the entire estimate.

laborCost.description: The total labor cost for the entire estimate.

subtotal.description: The subtotal of the estimate before tax and deposit.

tax.description: The total tax amount for the estimate.

total.description: The grand total of the estimate, including all costs and tax.

depositRequiredAmount.description: The total deposit amount required for this estimate.

depositPercentage.description: The percentage of the total required as a deposit (0-1).

depositPaidAmount.description: The actual amount of deposit paid by the client.

status.description: The current workflow status of the estimate (e.g., 'draft', 'sent', 'viewed', 'accepted', 'deposit_paid', 'scheduled', 'completed').

clientAccessToken.description: A secure, non-guessable token for client portal access to this specific estimate. (Store hashed if possible)

clientUrl.description: The full URL for client portal access using the access token.

lastViewedAt.description: Timestamp when the client last viewed the estimate in the portal.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the estimate was first sent to the client.

acceptedAt.description: Timestamp when the client accepted the estimate.

depositPaidAt.description: Timestamp when the deposit payment was successfully processed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the estimate record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the estimate record was last updated.

CrewMember.title: CrewMember
CrewMember.description: Represents an individual crew member with their rates and assignments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CrewMember entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this crew member belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N CrewMember)

userId.description: Reference to the User entity if this crew member also has a user account for the app. (Relationship: User 1:1 CrewMember)

name.description: The full name of the crew member.

email.description: The email address of the crew member for contact.

hourlyRate.description: The hourly rate for this crew member (e.g., $/hour).

laborRate.description: Specific labor rate details for certain tasks.

productionRate.description: Specific production rate details for certain tasks.

active.description: Indicates if the crew member is currently active and available.

crewIds.description: References to Crew entities this member belongs to. (Relationship: Crew N:N CrewMember)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the crew member record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the crew member record was last updated.

Crew.title: Crew
Crew.description: Represents a team of crew members, typically assigned to jobs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Crew entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this crew belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Crew)

name.description: The name of the crew (e.g., 'Alpha Team').

description.description: A description or purpose of the crew.

crewMemberIds.description: References to CrewMember entities that are part of this crew. (Relationship: Crew N:N CrewMember)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the crew record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the crew record was last updated.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Represents an active job derived from an accepted estimate, assigned to crews.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Job entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant entity this job belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Job)

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate entity from which this job was created. (Relationship: Estimate 1:1 Job)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer entity for this job. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Job)

jobSiteAddress.description: A snapshot of the job site address for this job.

crewIds.description: References to Crew entities assigned to this job. (Relationship: Crew N:N Job)

assignedCrewMemberIds.description: References to specific CrewMember entities assigned to this job, regardless of their crew. (Relationship: CrewMember N:N Job)

startDate.description: The scheduled start date and time for the job.

endDate.description: The scheduled end date and time for the job.

status.description: The current status of the job (e.g., 'pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled').

notes.description: Internal notes or comments about the job.

attachments.description: List of attached files (e.g., photos, documents) stored in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the job record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. The document ID (`userId`) is the Firebase Authentication UID. Each user document contains their `tenantId` and `role`, crucial for tenant-wide authorization checks. This collection is not nested under `/tenants/{tenantId}` to allow users to retrieve their own tenant context upon login.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Represents a single business tenant. The document ID (`tenantId`) is the unique identifier for the tenant. Contains top-level tenant information and `ownerUserId`.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

definition.description: Stores general business settings and pricing defaults for a tenant.
Stores communication threads. Includes customer details and last message metadata.
Individual messages in a chat thread.
Manages customer and lead information for a specific tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

definition.description: Defines raw materials and their costs for a specific tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: materialId
params.description: The unique identifier for the material.

definition.description: Defines complete fence styles including bill of materials for a specific tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: fenceStyleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the fence style.

definition.description: Defines post styles including bill of materials for a specific tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: postStyleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the post style.

definition.description: Defines gate styles including bill of materials for a specific tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: gateStyleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the gate style.

definition.description: Represents generated cost estimates for a customer's project. Crucially includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path, a `clientAccessToken` for secure client portal access, and snapshots of `contactSnapshot`, `jobSiteAddress`, `lineItems`, and `calculationSettingsSnapshot` to ensure historical integrity.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: estimateId
params.description: The unique identifier for the estimate.

definition.description: Represents individual crew members, their rates, and optionally links to a User entity if they have app access. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: crewMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier for the crew member.

definition.description: Represents teams of crew members. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: crewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the crew.

definition.description: Represents active jobs, derived from accepted estimates and assigned to crews/members. Includes denormalized 'tenantId' from the path. `attachments` field will store references to Firebase Cloud Storage.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tenant.

params.name: jobId
params.description: The unique identifier for the job.
